cases.input: Ideate one skill for plugins/acme that validates exported manifests without creating files.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces 2-3 kebab-case candidates, one recommended skill, dependencies, conflict status, STANDARD or FULL MOAT depth, known tools, line estimate, validation, and risks.

cases.input: Ideate an agent that coordinates manifest validation, changelog review, and release-note drafting.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects component_type agent, requires at least two managed skills, and rejects a one-skill orchestration boundary.

cases.input: Ideate a short command alias for the canonical validate-release command.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects component_type command, names invoked component, and distinguishes canonical command from alias.

cases.input: Ideate a hook using type command for the Stop event to validate closeout packets.
cases.expected_behavior: Accepts command/Stop compatibility, states hook context, and includes conflict resolution with existing validators.

cases.input: Brainstorm marketing campaign names for a product launch.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because the request is not about a plugin skill, agent, command, or hook.

cases.input: Ideate a component for the runtime plugin, but I do not know what type.
cases.expected_behavior: Asks one concise question choosing between skill, agent, command, or hook instead of inventing the type.

cases.input: Ideate a skill from this brief only: validate onboarding checklists. No repository path is available.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses source_mode plugin-brief, marks file-derived evidence as unavailable, and reports assumptions without failing.

cases.input: Ideate a skill named validate-manifest when validate-manifest already exists.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects or renames the duplicate candidate and records conflict resolution.

cases.input: Ideate a type prompt hook for the Stop event.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects prompt/Stop compatibility and proposes a compatible alternative.
